codeReview.summary: Pass. The fix commit correctly updates hasActiveOverlay to use truthiness (`!!state.errorMessage`) and aligns the test name with the actual null-case assertion. The rerun also provides concrete evidence for all previously missing frontend-arch validation flows (search result selection navigation, queue-to-workspace video context, highlights-to-workspace deep navigation context, and chat send + streaming response). The prior sidebar failure condition is resolved by the clarified acceptance interpretation: parent-owned shared state in `+page.svelte` is a valid Svelte 5 pattern when state is passed to extracted children.

summary: Reviewed fix-frontend-arch-verification (commit 41c083f) against prior frontend-arch blocking failures. No blocking or non-blocking defects found in the fix scope: overlays boolean check and test naming are correct, and the handoff/transcript now include concrete evidence for search, queue, highlights, and chat streaming flows. This rerun adequately resolves the prior failures for frontend-extract-sidebar, frontend-extract-search-guide, and frontend-finalize-code-splitting.
